pi_items.source: Evidence docs (README.md) and all task setup scripts reference 'Contemporary House' sample project. Screenshot 02_sample_selection.png shows Contemporary House is one of the built-in sample projects in DreamPlan. Task setup scripts (task_utils.ps1 functions Open-ContemporaryHouseFromStartScreen, Launch-DreamPlanWithSample, and all other task.json files in the environment reference Contemporary House, not Sample House.

Verified from evidence documentation (README.md states 'DreamPlan Home Design v9.28 by NCH Software'). NCH Software official website at https://www.nchsoftware.com/design/index.html confirms product name.

Verified in evidence screenshot 03_task_start_state.png which shows title bar 'DreamPlan by NCH Software - Contemporary House'. task_utils.ps1 Test-ContemporaryHouseOpen function checks for '*Contemporary House*' in window title, confirming 'DreamPlan' appears in the title.

privileged_info_summary: The task.json metadata incorrectly identifies the project as 'Sample House.dp' when the actual DreamPlan sample project used throughout this environment is 'Contemporary House'. This is confirmed by evidence documentation, screenshot evidence of the sample project selection dialog showing Contemporary House as one of 7 built-in sample projects, and all task setup scripts which explicitly reference and navigate to the Contemporary House sample project. The app name 'DreamPlan Home Design Software' by NCH Software is correct, as is the window title containing 'DreamPlan'.
